response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise, along with contributions to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks executive-level leadership experience, fintech-specific domain knowledge, and a clear track record of scaling multi-agent AI systems in production at scale.
strengths: Strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise, including event-driven architectures and real-time data processing.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators) and developer tooling.
Diverse technical background with experience in regulated environments and open-source GIS platforms.
concerns: No explicit executive-level leadership experience or track record of scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people.
Limited fintech-specific domain knowledge (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, or embedded finance).
Multi-agent AI experience appears exploratory rather than production-grade at scale.
